specific_question: What percentage of its efforts does the cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive focus on over-the-air (OTA) updates, and how will that percentage change going into 2026?
answer: The cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive currently allocates 23% of its efforts to OTA updates, but that number is planned to increase to 30% in 2026 as the robustness of OTA updates continues to grow in significance within the scope of cybersecurity and the automotive market.
